creator: kristinacors
caption: How To Get Your Hands On Coachella Tickets For 1 Loyalty Point Instead of Thousands With Marriott Bonvoy #travelbucketlist #travelseries #marriottbonvoymoments #coachella2026 #1pointdrop

transcription.text: This travel hack will get you free Coachella tickets. So watch until the end so you understand how to take full advantage. Okay, so Marriott Bonvoy has something called Marriott Bonvoy Moments, which is part of the Marriott Bonvoy Loyalty Program, and basically allows you to use points to access all these unique once-in-a-lifetime experiences. They also have this thing called One Point Drop, which is basically a limited promo where you can access an experience at Coachella for one loyalty point instead of thousands. Their first drop is for Coachella Weekend 1, and I don't know about you, but I would die for tickets. The promo drops on February 25th at 12 p.m. Eastern Standard Time. Here are the details about the package, and yes, you get two guest passes. So basically, once this promo goes live, you have to be a Marriott Bonvoy member to participate, which by the way is free and only takes one minute to do. You'll also have to have at least one point in your account before the drop starts. Now if you don't have points and you're trying to figure out how to get Marriott Bonvoy points, check out part two where I'll break down all the ways you can get points. And follow if you want to learn more travel hacks like this.
